query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: Multiple high-rise residential towers at night, viewed from a distance across an open vista. The buildings feature grid-like patterns of illuminated windows and small red aircraft warning lights on their rooftops. A uniform warm tone fills the sky, partially obscuring the upper portions of the structures and gradually reducing visibility toward the left side of the frame. The tallest tower stands prominently at the right, while additional buildings of varying heights recede toward the center and left.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Multiple high-rise residential towers at night shrouded in a dense, sickly yellow-brown haze that coats the scene with an oppressive, contaminated monochrome. The suffocating low contrast smears the buildings into the murky sky, erasing dimensional depth and creating an atmosphere of urban dread and isolation. Scattered illuminated windows punctuate the facades of the monolithic blocks, which progressively dissolve into the noxious gloom toward the horizon.
